---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a concrete improvement to ApplyFlow
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem statement
What user or developer problem are you trying to solve?

## Proposed change
Describe the behavior you would like to see.

## Why this fits ApplyFlow
Explain why this belongs in this repository.

## Alternatives considered
Describe any alternatives or workarounds you considered.

## Additional context
Add mockups, links, examples, or constraints if helpful.
